TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga_psani’_skura_yow_na_nni’an, title = gaga_psani’_skura_yow_na_nni’an, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga_psani’_skura_yow_na_nni’an} }

S.FORM: gaga psani' skura yow na nni'an (1)iyik na nbuw uwow ga tmring uwow tluling ro rpusun gleng uwow, skura lutux bnkisan ro msina howey na lutux . (2)ini kani' hoyin, patung ro tla'ung, kani' laga kba' mga'in. (3)mrkyas ro la'iy ga ini kani' tunux sinuw, ro biyux sinuw, ro kakey na sinuw uy. (4)suley ro pipi na sinuw, la'iy ga ini hmtiy mani' mani' laga hlow mrpyut insuna, kwara kwe ga nanak bnkis ga thoyey mani'. (5)uwah mtisan Sali lpyung ga ini kani' bih tanux Sali' kya, kwara nni'an ga spni'an na lpyung, ro bkis lama mani', la'iy ga puting mani'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 書目來源:江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .

gaga psani' skura yow na nni'an (1)iyik na nbuw uwow ga tmring uwow tluling ro rpusun gleng uwow, skura lutux bnkisan ro msina howey na lutux . (2)ini kani' hoyin, patung ro tla'ung, kani' laga kba' mga'in. (3)mrkyas ro la'iy ga ini kani' tunux sinuw, ro biyux sinuw, ro kakey na sinuw uy. (4)suley ro pipi na sinuw, la'iy ga ini hmtiy mani' mani' laga hlow mrpyut insuna, kwara kwe ga nanak bnkis ga thoyey mani'. (5)uwah mtisan Sali lpyung ga ini kani' bih tanux Sali' kya, kwara nni'an ga spni'an na lpyung, ro bkis lama mani', la'iy ga puting mani'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 書目來源:江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .
S.PHON: ɣaɣa ps~ɕaniʔ s~ɕkura jow na nniʔan (*)ijik na nβuw uwow ɣa tmriŋ uwow tluliŋ ro rpus~ɕun ɣleŋ uwow, s~ɕkura lutux βnkis~ɕan ro ms~ɕina ħowej na lutux . (*)ini kaniʔ ħojin, patuŋ ro tlaʔuŋ, kaniʔ laɣa kβaʔ mɣaʔin. (*)mrkjas~ɕ ro laʔij ɣa ini kaniʔ tunux s~ɕinuw, ro βijux s~ɕinuw, ro kakej na s~ɕinuw uj. (*)s~ɕulej ro pipi na s~ɕinuw, laʔij ɣa ini ħmtij maniʔ maniʔ laɣa ħlow mrpjut ins~ɕuna, kwara kwe ɣa nanak βnkis~ɕ ɣa tħojej maniʔ. (*)uwaħ mtis~ɕan s~ɕali lpjuŋ ɣa ini kaniʔ βiħ tanux s~ɕaliʔ kja, kwara nniʔan ɣa s~ɕpniʔan na lpjuŋ, ro βkis~ɕ lama maniʔ, laʔij ɣa putiŋ maniʔ. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ****:***jawi*nomin, .
